# The Pretender

<!-- source: PDF p.30 -->

## Creating a Pretender

<!-- p.31 -->

### Physical form

<!-- p.31 -->

#### Immortal Pretenders

<!-- p.31 -->

#### Immobile Pretenders

<!-- p.31 -->

#### Dragon Pretenders

<!-- p.31 -->

#### Trinities

<!-- p.32 -->

### Magic

<!-- p.32 -->

### Divine Magic

<!-- p.32 -->

### Bless Effects

<!-- p.32 -->

### Dominion

<!-- p.34 -->

#### Scales

<!-- p.34 -->

### The Awakening

<!-- p.36 -->

### Pretender death

<!-- p.36 -->

#### Death of Immortal Pretenders

<!-- p.36 -->

#### Call God

<!-- p.36 -->

### Automatic Bless Effects

<!-- p.37 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
